content.en:
"Good stuff?"

Hearing this, Ye Tian's eyes flashed, and he immediately followed the Dark Celestial Ape deep into the lair.

The coercion of the Celestial Mangbeast was very strong, but the Dark Celestial Ape could barely withstand the vicinity of the Celestial Mangbeast, and the Dark Celestial Ape could also protect Ye Tian, which made Ye Tian not need to worry about the coercion of the Celestial Mangbeast, and he didn't have to try to mobilize the power of the Chaos Black Lotus at all.

Going deep into the lair, a man and a beast came to a huge underground lair.

It is gorgeously decorated by the Celestial Beast, and the surrounding rock walls are full of shiny hedrons, filling the entire lair with colorful colors.

In addition, there were a large number of Chaos Crystals in the lair of the Heavenly Mangbeast, and the quality was much better than what Ye Tian had obtained in the Chaos Tide at the beginning.

Such a huge amount of Chaos Crystal, its value is so high, and now it is piled up here like stones.

Of course, these Chaos Crystals are undoubtedly such treasures of relatively ordinary value, and there are many other treasures.

The Dark Celestial Ape doesn't look down on ordinary treasures, after all, the Dark Celestial Ape clan was also one of the overlords of this small world, although the other powerful Dark Celestial Ape left, but there were a lot of resources left.

If it didn't dare to impact the galaxy level, it would have used those resources to impact the galaxy level, galaxy level, and even the cosmic god realm.

"It's all the treasures of the Celestial Mangbeast, take whatever you think is useful. At the beginning, when the Celestial Mangbeast was still alive, no one dared to enter here. It's a pity that the Celestial Mangbeast is dead now, so we can come and leave if we want. "The Dark Celestial Ape, Dao.

"Don't you want these treasures?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's useless for me to ask for these treasures!" said the Dark Celestial Ape, "I will need to leave this universe in a while, I am not a creature of this universe, and if I am here, I will not be able to ascend to a higher realm at all." And the way I walked was more special, it was a means left by the master, and I couldn't leave with more treasures, otherwise I would fail. “

"Leaving the Universe !!"

Ye Tian was shocked, I am afraid that even the Supreme in the universe can not do it, and the master of the Golden Desolation Hall actually left a means to let the Dark Heavenly Ape leave, what a means of such a means.

He didn't ask how to leave, as a cosmic being, he was destined to leave the universe too far when he couldn't get out, otherwise he wouldn't be able to survive.

So, if he can't get rid of it, what's the use of asking how to leave?

"Can I take it all?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Dark Ape doesn't care.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to collect these treasures, he first put away those chaos crystals, and then began to collect other treasures.

After a while, Ye Tian put away most of the treasures.

Suddenly.

A golden-veined flower caught Ye Tian's attention, this golden-veined floret was originally stored in a jade box, but it was opened by Ye Tian.

At the moment when it was opened, Ye Tian's copying talent actually came with a longing emotion.

"This flower can transform my copying talent!"

Ye Tian was excited.

I don't know how long it has been, but his copying talent has not improved again.

For such a long time, he had seen countless treasures, and he had seen many treasures that could improve his talent, but his copying talent had not moved at all.

He even thought that his copying talent had reached its highest limit, and there was no way to continue to improve.

But now, this little flower told Ye Tian that his copying talent had not yet reached its limit, and he could continue to improve.

Immediately.

Ye Tian carefully put away this golden-veined little flower, and did not show too abnormal movements.

He was going to wait until he left, and then refine this little golden-veined flower.

In addition to this golden-veined flower, there are many more precious treasures, which are definitely very helpful to the master level.

Many of the treasures here are too high-level, and Ye Tian may not need them now, but he can completely trade with the Supreme Hall of the Human Race or trade with the nine supreme-level forces in exchange for the treasures he wants.

Soon, Ye Tian basically robbed his treasures.

Originally, Ye Tian also planned to let the Dark Celestial Ape take him to sweep away many overlord-level lairs in the Chaos Small World, but when he thought about it, he had no right to let the Dark Celestial Ape do this.

The Dark Celestial Ape was able to bring him here because he became the inheritor of the reserves, so he was given a chance to apologize.

If he continued to let the Dark Ape take him to find treasures, it would be a bit excessive, and it would even cause the Dark Ape to resent.

Besides, it's okay to have enough resources, and it's not good to be too greedy.

Immediately.

The Dark Sky Ape left, and Ye Tian didn't linger any longer, and hurriedly rushed to the place where he entered the small world of chaos.

It had been long enough for him to enter the small world of Chaos, according to the original agreement of the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain.

Every other year, the masters of the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain will help open up a passage for the people of the Chaos Small World to come out.

But if it's been too long, if the people of the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain think that there is no one in the small world of Chaos, they may leave.

"The master of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain has been in the outside world for a few years at most, and when I first talked to Li Xin'er, she suggested that I should leave within three years, and now three years have already passed. I hope that the master of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain will wait a little longer, otherwise I will have to wait slowly for the upper echelons of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race to come and save me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

----------

this day.

Ye Tian came to the place where he had just entered the small world of chaos, and at this time this was still the territory of the chaotic mammoths, but these chaotic mammoths did not gather together, but scattered in all directions.

Ye Tian retracted his breath, sneaked in, and waited silently.

As soon as he waited for the spatial passage to open, he immediately rushed out.

As for these bastard mammoths, there is no way to get out, and if they force them out, they will definitely be wiped out by the masters of the outside world.

Time passed little by little, and another three months passed.

At this point, four years have passed.

Bang!!!!

The space is cracked!

A spatial passage appeared, attracting the attention of many Chaos Mammoths.

However, these bastard mammoths were very afraid of this spatial passage and did not dare to enter it.

Because none of the companions who entered the passage returned, they thought they were dead.

Therefore, they do not dare to enter the space passage.

Shout!

Ye Tian teleported over, trying to quickly enter the spatial passage.

At this time, several chaotic mammoths discovered Ye Tian and stopped him.

"Die!"

As soon as Ye Tian waved his hand, black lotus flowers appeared, and soon turned into black lotus realms.

These Black Lotus Realms enveloped these chaotic mammoths, and then crushed the space of the Black Lotus Realm.

Puff puff puff!!

The head of the mammoth was directly crushed into slag, leaving no life at all, and all of them were wiped out.

Without the obstruction of these chaotic mammoths, Ye Tian successfully entered the spatial passage and disappeared.

......

Cosmic Void.

Ye Tian came out of the spatial passage and saw an Origin Artifact Warship, which was the one from the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

The people of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain haven't left yet!

Seeing Ye Tian come out, a portal appeared on the warship of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, allowing Ye Tian to enter the warship.

Inside the warship.

Ye Tian saw Li Xin'er, and Li Xin'er smiled at this time, and it seemed that she had gained a lot.

"Your Highness Wanfa, you have finally come out. If it weren't for the fact that I knew that you would not fall, I suggested that the warship stay for a while, otherwise you would have waited for a while longer, and the people from the Supreme Hall of the Terran would come forward to rescue you!" Li Xin'er said.

"Thank you Fairy Xin'er, I have something to delay inside!"

Ye Tian said.

"It seems that His Highness Wanfa has gained a good harvest!"

Li Xin'er said.

"It's just scraping the nest of a powerful creature!" Ye Tian explained.

"That's good luck!"

Li Xin'er said.

"However, you would never guess what treasure I obtained?" Li Xin'er said.

"Could it be that the Chaos Spirit Treasure can't be?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"You guessed it, I did get a Chaos Spirit Treasure, but I was already taken away by one of the masters of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race. This is also for the sake of safety, the value of a Chaos Spirit Treasure is comparable to that of a Heavenly Venerable. "

Li Xin'er said.

Ye Tian was not disappointed that he had not been able to see the true face of that Chaos Spirit Treasure.

His harvest this time was even more precious than the Chaos Spirit Treasure, and besides, if the Chaos Spirit Treasure was given to him, he wouldn't be able to use it.

After Ye Tian arrived, the people of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain did not continue to wait, but drove the warship away.

If there are still people in the Chaos Small World who have not come out, the Supremes of the Chaos Yuan Divine Mountain will definitely be able to deduce it, and it is a big deal to send the Masters to rescue them when the time comes.

As for now, they still need to send these disciples who came out alive back to the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, which is the most important thing at the moment.

After all, this is not the territory of the Terrans, and the more you stay here, the more likely it is to be discovered.

For the sake of safety, they naturally had to leave immediately.

A few days later, the Origin Artifact Warship returned to the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

Ye Tian did not stay in the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and quickly let the Dark Lord take him away, and let the Dark Lord take Ye Tian back to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

As soon as he came back, Ye Tian couldn't hold back any longer, and hurriedly took out the golden-veined flower.

"I hope I can make an amazing difference in my copying talent!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Immediately, he swallowed the golden-veined flower in one gulp and began to refine it rapidly.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying energy instantly submerged Ye Tian's immortal soul and drilled into the talent mark of the copy talent, causing the talent mark of the copy talent to slowly transform.

Time passed little by little, and the pain that Ye Tian endured became more and more terrifying.

But the strong will and the powerful immortal soul made Ye Tian gradually withstand it.

I don't know how long it took, but the pain disappeared, leaving only a feeling of relief.

For the first time, Ye Tian checked his copying talent.
